A '''paralysis cord''', also known as '''stun cord''', was a weapon used by [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88]] to paralyze a target for live capture. The cord was similar in function to a [[Whipcord launcher/Legends|whipcord launcher]], in that when fired it unspooled a large amount of animated cord, that proceeded to wrap itself around a target. Unlike a whipcord however, a paralysis cord kept on unspooling, until it had completely bound an enemy in its coils. Essentially, this paralyzed the victim, as the tight coils disabled a sentients ability to move. Some models of paralysis cord had conductive metals interwoven through its fabric, in which after enveloping an enemy, a powercell would electrify the cord, and further incapacitate the target.

{{Weapon-stub}}
